title: SEO Engine Effectiveness Test Plan — Phase 21.1

tests.action: Indexing target fix (7 pages: guides + unknown-to-Google calculators/comparisons)
tests.expected_kpi: At least 3 of 7 pages appear in indexed count or get impressions within 7-21 days
tests.measurement: URL Inspection API check + GSC API page-level impressions
tests.correction_if_fail: Investigate sitemap, robots, canonical issues. Improve content quality. Add more internal links from higher-authority pages.

tests.action: Internal authority push (40 links across 15 targets)
tests.expected_kpi: At least 3 parent/guide pages show improved impressions or position within 14-21 days
tests.correction_if_fail: Links may not be in crawler-visible sections. Strengthen source page context. Use higher-authority source pages.

tests.action: GSC UI indexing requests (7 eligible pages)
tests.expected_kpi: At least 3 of 7 pages become indexed or crawled within 3-7 days
tests.correction_if_fail: Pages may have quality issues. Improve content before re-requesting.

tests.expected_kpi: At least 1 reply or backlink from 12 follow-ups (beats old 0/20 rate)
tests.correction_if_fail: Pause outreach. Rewrite pitch entirely. Target smaller sites only.
